title: Docker git for platform-spec git-meta and docs-ui CSS sync

source.subject: chore(docker): update Dockerfile to include git for platform-spec generation

body:
Website production Docker image installs **git** so platform-spec git-meta prebuild (`generate-platform-spec-git-meta.mjs`) succeeds in container builds.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`b219677`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/b219677)
- **Subject:** chore(docker): update Dockerfile to include git for platform-spec generation
- **Completed:** 2026-05-24

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `dev-experience`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-docs-reader-hardening`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **Docs reader hardening** (`v03-docs-reader-hardening`).
